duas.title: Bismillah
duas.translation: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful

duas.title: Alhamdulillah
duas.translation: All praise is due to Allah, Lord of the worlds

duas.title: Ayat al-Kursi (Part 1)
duas.arabicText: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ
duas.translation: Allah - there is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of existence

duas.title: Before Sleeping
duas.translation: In Your name, O Allah, I die and I live

duas.title: After Waking Up
duas.arabicText: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah who gave us life after having given us death and unto Him is the resurrection
